summary: Phase 1.5 buyer-behavior anomaly detector: trains on labels.parquet joined to Group A features, reports per-class precision/recall for item_swap and empty_return, exposes inference schema with feature_summary for Phase 2 UI evidence. ADR-011 scope enforced.

warnings.description: Sparse empty_return labels in small synthetic datasets require golden profile augmentation for stable 3-class training.
warnings.rationale: Documented in ADR-016 and train.py; production backtest runs use larger datasets.

interfaceChanges.description: Train RandomForest on labeled returns; writes per-class metrics.json and training_log.json.
Return-level join of labels.parquet and buyer×shop feature matrix.

mappings.criterion: train writes per class metrics json for item_swap and empty_return
per class metrics reported separately on held out split
Golden item_swap row scores as anomaly with class item_swap
Golden empty_return row scores as anomaly with class empty_return
Golden other legitimate return scores non-anomaly
Feature matrix for anomaly training contains no affiliate creator column names
Inference output schema anomaly_class confidence feature_summary
No affiliate fraud commission dispute creator signals ADR-011
